commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps GatewayConnectionManager's two async void node event handlers in top-level try/catch blocks that log and record diagnostics for unhandled exceptions.

Reproducibility: Source-level yes: current main has the two connection handlers as async void and both await _transitionSemaphore.WaitAsync before any top-level catch. I did not run a Windows crash harness in this read-only PR review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is identified; the remaining gate is clean required validation and maintainer choice on landing this narrow partial fix while the broader issue remains open.

target.title: [Repo Assist] fix(connection): guard async void event handlers against unhandled exceptions
target.body:
🤖 *This PR was created by Repo Assist, an automated AI assistant.*

## Summary

Wraps `OnNodeStatusChanged` and `OnNodePairingStatusChanged` in `GatewayConnectionManager` with top-level `try/catch(Exception ex)` blocks so that any unhandled exception is logged instead of terminating the process.

Partial fix for #552.

## Root Cause

Both handlers are `async void` event handlers. The `await _transitionSemaphore.WaitAsync()` call appears **before** any `catch` block. An exception thrown before or outside the inner `try/finally` (e.g., `ObjectDisposedException` from the semaphore on shutdown, or any future regression in the preamble code) bypasses both WinUI's `UnhandledException` handler and AppDomain crash handlers, causing a silent process termination.

## Fix

Added a top-level `try { ... } catch (Exception ex) { _logger.Warn(...); _diagnostics.Record(...); }` wrapping the full body of each handler. The inner try/finally structure (semaphore, state machine, CAS guard for auto-approve) is preserved unchanged.

## Scope

This PR covers only the two connection-layer handlers — the smallest contained unit that can be tested without a Windows runtime. The broader WinUI surface (~46 additional `async void` handlers) is tracked in #552 and will need a separate pass with Windows UI testing.

## Test Status

```
dotnet test tests/OpenClaw.Connection.Tests/  → Passed: 256/256
dotnet test tests/OpenClaw.Shared.Tests/      → Passed: 2014, Failed: 8 (pre-existing infrastructure failures, unrelated)
dotnet test tests/OpenClaw.Tray.Tests/        → Passed: 842, Skipped: 1
```
